private async Task SendEmailAsync(
    Guid emailId,
    CancellationToken cancellationToken)
{
    var request = new OrganizationRequest("SendEmail");

    request["EmailId"] = emailId;
    request["IssueSend"] = true;

    await _dataverseRepo.ExecuteAsync(request, cancellationToken);
}

await SendEmailAsync(emailId, cancellationToken);

_logger.LogInformation(
    "DIA notification email sent. EmailId: {EmailId}, LogId: {LogId}, Title: {LogErrorTitle}.",
    emailId,
    logId,
    logErrorTitle);

Send DIA exception notification email through Dataverse
